tasks.title: Tighten change-orchestrator.md with borrowed conductor disciplines

subtasks.title: Encode explicit start/resume routing: change-new starts, change-continue resumes, disk is authoritative; reject folder-guess mode inference (evidence: gentle-ai:internal/assets/opencode/sdd-orchestrator.md:3-25; ai-harness:src/ai_harness/resources/change-agent/change-orchestrator.md:3-29; ai-harness:src/ai_harness/modules/harness/change.py:45-89)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: New change starts through start route; Scenario: Existing change resumes through resume route; Scenario: Folder guess is rejected

subtasks.title: Bind human approval to the exact reviewed artifact set and reopen review on any reviewed-artifact edit, session gap, or compaction (evidence: gentle-ai:internal/assets/opencode/sdd-orchestrator.md:98-108,182-220; ai-harness:docs/design/change-orchestrator.md:173-258,394-423)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: Reviewed design changes before implementation; Scenario: Different artifact set requires review; Scenario: Resume after gap reopens review

subtasks.title: Maintain a session-scoped launch log keyed by (phase, task_fingerprint) and refuse duplicate delegation in the same turn/session (evidence: gentle-ai:internal/assets/opencode/sdd-orchestrator.md:182-220; ai-harness:src/ai_harness/resources/change-agent/change-orchestrator.md:110-166)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: First launch records key; Scenario: Same key is refused; Scenario: Changed fingerprint can launch

subtasks.title: Inject exact SKILL.md paths from available registry/context via a Skills to load before work block; never invent or summarize paths (evidence: gentle-ai:internal/skillregistry/registry.go:231-247; gentle-ai:docs/opencode-profiles.md:124-182; gentle-ai:internal/assets/opencode/sdd-orchestrator.md:331-391)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: Skill exists in registry; Scenario: Skill is missing; Scenario: Guessed path is rejected

subtasks.title: Establish explicit auto/interactive session mode with phase gates that pause for review before implementation; auto only continues after pass + current review + unblocked facts (evidence: gentle-ai:docs/opencode-profiles.md:11-12,64-66; gentle-ai:internal/assets/opencode/sdd-orchestrator.md:98-108,182-220)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: Interactive pauses before implementation; Scenario: Auto stops on failed or blocked facts; Scenario: Auto does not bypass review; Scenario: Mode does not drift mid-session

subtasks.title: Preserve prior conductor behavior: parent-decomposition carve-out, prompt-only resume gate, subagent result block shape, and CLI/state authority boundaries (evidence: ai-harness:src/ai_harness/resources/change-agent/change-orchestrator.md:58-108,110-166; ai-harness:docs/design/change-orchestrator.md:109-156,260-316)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: Parent split continues planning flow; Scenario: Resume after session gap; Scenario: Prompt receives route contract

tasks.title: Normalize change-explorer.md result envelope with semantic facts

subtasks.title: Replace the explorer-specific result block with the shared envelope (status/artifacts/summary/semantic_facts/skills) so the orchestrator consumes one shape (evidence: gentle-ai:internal/assets/opencode/sdd-orchestrator.md:299-327,331-391; ai-harness:src/ai_harness/resources/change-agent/change-explorer.md:1-56)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: Explorer returns shared envelope

subtasks.title: Move exploration budget and follow-up scope facts under semantic_facts using consistent names so resume can recover them from prose (evidence: ai-harness:src/ai_harness/resources/change-agent/change-explorer.md:21-43; ai-harness:docs/design/change-orchestrator.md:435-552)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: Explorer records budget facts; Scenario: Orchestrator resumes after exploration

subtasks.title: Require explorer to report skills: loaded|fallback|none and degraded skill_resolution detail when the registry cannot resolve (evidence: gentle-ai:internal/skillregistry/registry.go:231-247; gentle-ai:internal/assets/opencode/sdd-orchestrator.md:331-391)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: Skill loaded successfully; Scenario: Skill fallback used; Scenario: No skills required

subtasks.title: Preserve blocking policy: explorer stops with missing-input explanation before the block when it cannot proceed (evidence: ai-harness:src/ai_harness/resources/change-agent/change-explorer.md:45-55)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: Waiting and blocked facts remain explicit

tasks.title: Normalize change-implementor.md result envelope with semantic facts

subtasks.title: Replace the implementor-specific result block with the shared envelope (status/artifacts/summary/semantic_facts/skills) and keep partial as a semantic_facts value, not the top-level status (evidence: gentle-ai:internal/assets/opencode/sdd-orchestrator.md:299-327; ai-harness:src/ai_harness/resources/change-agent/change-implementor.md:55-61; ai-harness:docs/design/change-orchestrator.md:435-552)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: Implementor returns shared envelope

subtasks.title: Surface changed-files and partial-state facts under semantic_facts so resume can recover what was actually committed vs remaining (evidence: ai-harness:src/ai_harness/resources/change-agent/change-implementor.md:1-61; ai-harness:docs/design/change-orchestrator.md:435-552)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: Implementor records partial facts

subtasks.title: Require implementor to report skills: loaded|fallback|none and skill_resolution detail; degraded skill injection must not silently invent paths (evidence: gentle-ai:internal/skillregistry/registry.go:231-247; ai-harness:src/ai_harness/resources/change-agent/change-orchestrator.md:110-166)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: Skill loaded successfully; Scenario: Skill fallback used; Scenario: Guessed path is rejected

subtasks.title: Keep one-commit-per-task and the implementation.md write discipline intact, including task-next/task-done sequencing (evidence: ai-harness:src/ai_harness/resources/change-agent/change-implementor.md:14-37)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: Waiting and blocked facts remain explicit

tasks.title: Normalize change-validator.md result envelope with semantic facts

subtasks.title: Replace the validator-specific result block with the shared envelope (status/artifacts/summary/semantic_facts/skills) so verdict/critical ride alongside explorer/validator facts (evidence: gentle-ai:internal/assets/opencode/sdd-orchestrator.md:299-327,331-391; ai-harness:src/ai_harness/resources/change-agent/change-validator.md:71-79; ai-harness:docs/design/change-orchestrator.md:435-552)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: Validator returns shared envelope

subtasks.title: Move verdict and critical failure marker under semantic_facts using consistent names; keep them also written into validation.md prose for resume recovery (evidence: gentle-ai:internal/assets/opencode/sdd-orchestrator.md:299-327; ai-harness:src/ai_harness/resources/change-agent/change-validator.md:38-69)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: Validator records verdict facts; Scenario: Orchestrator resumes after validation

subtasks.title: Require validator to report skills: loaded|fallback|none and degraded skill_resolution; missing semantic facts must surface as failed or blocked, never silent pass (evidence: gentle-ai:internal/skillregistry/registry.go:231-247; ai-harness:src/ai_harness/resources/change-agent/change-validator.md:1-79)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: Skill loaded successfully; Scenario: Skill fallback used; Scenario: Validator rejects missing facts

subtasks.title: Preserve blocking policy B (CRITICAL-only) and the verdict gate so archive routing still follows pass / pass-with-warnings / fail (evidence: ai-harness:src/ai_harness/resources/change-agent/change-validator.md:28-43; ai-harness:docs/design/change-orchestrator.md:425-447)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: Waiting and blocked facts remain explicit

tasks.title: Document borrowed conductor disciplines in docs/design/change-orchestrator.md

subtasks.title: Update the Start/resume section to make command + disk authority explicit and remove folder-guess language (evidence: gentle-ai:internal/assets/opencode/sdd-orchestrator.md:3-25; ai-harness:src/ai_harness/modules/harness/change.py:45-89)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: Prompt receives route contract; Scenario: Folder guess is rejected; Scenario: New route collides with existing change

subtasks.title: Tighten the Human review gate section to bind approval to the reviewed artifact set and reopen review on edits / resume / compaction (evidence: ai-harness:docs/design/change-orchestrator.md:109-156,173-258; gentle-ai:internal/assets/opencode/sdd-orchestrator.md:98-108,182-220)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: Reviewed design changes before implementation; Scenario: Resume after gap reopens review; Scenario: Resume after compaction reopens review

subtasks.title: Document the per-phase result envelope (status/artifacts/summary/semantic_facts/skills) and how each phase-specific fact is recovered on resume (evidence: ai-harness:docs/design/change-orchestrator.md:435-552; ai-harness:src/ai_harness/resources/change-agent/change-explorer.md:1-56; change-implementor.md:1-61; change-validator.md:1-79)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: Explorer returns shared envelope; Scenario: Implementor returns shared envelope; Scenario: Validator returns shared envelope; Scenario: Orchestrator resumes after validation

subtasks.title: Document the duplicate-launch guard: (phase, task_fingerprint) launch log, refusal wording, and degradation to CLI/state when prompt memory is insufficient (evidence: gentle-ai:internal/assets/opencode/sdd-orchestrator.md:182-220; gentle-ai:internal/cli/run_integration_test.go:2062-2075)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: First launch records key; Scenario: Same key is refused; Scenario: Prompt memory is insufficient

subtasks.title: Document exact SKILL.md path injection, the Skills to load before work handoff, and skills: loaded|fallback|none plus skill_resolution reporting (evidence: gentle-ai:internal/skillregistry/registry.go:231-247; gentle-ai:docs/opencode-profiles.md:124-182)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: Skill exists in registry; Scenario: Skill is missing; Scenario: Skill loaded successfully

subtasks.title: Document the auto/interactive phase gate: mode source, mode stability, interactive pause-before-implementation, auto-continues-only-when-safe (evidence: gentle-ai:docs/opencode-profiles.md:11-12,64-66; ai-harness:docs/design/change-orchestrator.md:173-258,260-316,394-423)
subtasks.scenario: Scenario: Interactive pauses before implementation; Scenario: Auto continues after safe pass; Scenario: Auto stops on failed or blocked facts; Scenario: Mode does not drift mid-session
